title: Tetrion Easy Spray Fluorescent Spray Paint Green for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Smooth Application on Wood, Metal, Ceramic, Plastic400ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

DURABLE & WEATHER-RESISTANT: Ideal for both indoor and outdoor projects, it delivers long-lasting results that withstand the elements while maintaining bright colours
EFFORTLESS APPLICATION: Designed for ease of use, this spray paint ensures smooth application Even beginners can achieve professional results with minimal effort
WIDE COLOUR RANGE: Available in a range of stunning fluorescent shades, it makes your artistic projects bright, vivid, and truly stand out
ideal FOR ALL PROJECTS: Whether you're working on crafts, home decor, or DIY renovations, our spray paint is an ideal choice for creativity and durability
